_description: Mock market/competition news feed. Used by NewsTool to surface external events (competition hypothesis).

news.headline: Amazon.de launches aggressive Prime Day electronics discounts
news.summary: Amazon.de undercut consumer-electronics prices by up to 30% during Prime Day, drawing buyer traffic away from competing marketplaces including eBay.

news.headline: MediaMarkt expands same-day delivery across Germany
news.summary: MediaMarkt's faster fulfillment improves its competitiveness in German electronics retail, pressuring third-party marketplace sellers.

news.headline: Fast-fashion import tariffs reduced in the US
news.summary: Lower tariffs cut landed costs for cross-border fashion sellers, supporting more competitive pricing and higher GMV.

news.headline: EU logistics carrier strike disrupts cross-border shipping
news.summary: A multi-day carrier strike delayed cross-border deliveries into the EU, dampening conversion and increasing cancellations in early June.
